raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N ta nomeflota Teefa
etappe Jahsepa Behr-
neem/no Jardanas prett
Jeriku/ pee ta Jerikus Uhdens
prett Rihteem/ ta Tuksnete/ kas
no Jerikus steeṗjahs zaur teem
Beteles Kalneem/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nahk no Beteles abra us
Lusu/ un tekk zaur ta Arkitera
Rohbeschü/lihds Atarotain/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no-eet prett Wakkara
Puffes us to Jawletes Rohbe-
schu/ lihds Bet-Ohrona Rohbeschai
leijä/ un lihds Baserei/un winnas
Gals steeṗjahs lihds Juhrat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta irr Jahsepa Behrni/
Manaffus un Eewräims fawu
Jhpaschunu dabbujschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Eewräima Behrnu Roh-
beschü/ pehz fawahm Saimehm/
irr fcht/ (prohti) ta Rohbeschü
winno eemantojamäs Teefas/ A-
tarot-Ahdars prett Rihteem/lihds
tam angfchejam Bet-Ohronam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fcht Rohbeschü nahk ah-
ra prett Wakkara Puffes pee
Mikinetates no Seemeta Puffes/
un fcht Rohbeschü greeschahs prett
Rihteem us Taënat Sihlu/un eet
zaur winnu no Rihta Puffes
lihds Janoat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un noteek no Janoas us
Atarotu/ un Naäratu/ un steeṗ-
jahs us Jeriku/ un nahk pee Jar-
danas ahra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "No Tapnas steeṗjahs fchi
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Pilssfahti/ kas bija
atschkirti preeksch Eewräima
Behrneem/btja Manaffus Behr-
nu Jhpaschuma Widdü/ wihi tee
Pilssfahti/ un winnu Zeemi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee ne tsdsinne tohs Ka-
naniterus/ kas Gaseraa dsihwoja/
ta dsihwoja tee Kananiteri Eewra-
ima Widdü/ lihds schodeen/ bet
tee kalpoja teem/ to usliktu Teefu
dohdami.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rohbeschü prett Wakkara Puff-
fes/ us to Kanas Uppi/ un win-
nas Gals irr pee Intkas. Schis
irr tas Jhpaschums Eewräima
Behrnu Zilts/pehz fawahm Sa-
mehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XVII. Nodalla.
Tahs Manaffus Zilts Jhpaschuns: 1. Jrto
Zelaweada Meitu Dafta: 3. Jahsepa Behr-
ni schehlojahs ka winnu Jhpaschuns mas: 14-
Un tee Kananiteri wiffai stipri irr: 16. Josu-
us dohd teem tahs Kalna-Weetas/un pakuhdi-
na tohs/ tohs Kananiterus no turrenes is-
diht: 17/ 18-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ai Manaffus Zilti ktna
Garridsan weena nomeflo-
ta Teefa/ jo winch bija
Jahsepa Pirmdsints/ (prohti)
Makiram/tam Manaffus Pirin-
dsintam/ Gileada Tehwam/ jo
tas bija weens stipris Karra-
Wihrs/ tad ktua winnam Gile-
ads un Bahsans.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir teem atlifkuscheem Ma-
naffus Behrneem/ tikke weena
Teefa pehz tawahm Saimehm/
(prohti) AbiEsera Behrneem/
un Eeleka Behrneem/ un As-
rieka Behrneem/ un Sekema
Behrneem/ un Eewera Behr-
neem/ un Semida Behrneem.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
